abstract: Comprehensive authoring guide for the Swirls DSL. Covers file structure (twelve top-level declarations plus the optional `version:` line: schema, form, webhook, schedule, graph, stream, trigger, secret, auth, postgres, disk, agent), graph declarations, all 16 node types (ai, agent, bucket, code, disk, email, graph, http, map, parallel, postgres, scrape, stream, switch, wait, while), inline `subgraph { }` blocks for map/while, embedded TypeScript/JSON/SQL blocks, the context object including `context.iteration.*` (item/index/input/previous), resources, triggers, top-level stream blocks with condition/prepare, reusable top-level `schema` blocks referenced by bare identifier, form `visibility` (public/internal), webhook shared-secret authentication via `secret:` + `header:`, reviews, failure policies, and known parser pitfalls with an exhaustive validator-diagnostic cheatsheet.
